faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in Hollis homes?
faqs.answer: Hollis residents typically encounter pavement ants, odorous house ants, and carpenter ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning in this neighborhood due to the many older wooden homes. Our technicians identify the specific species during inspection to ensure the most effective treatment approach for your property.
